properties.title: ARCEME Multi-Source Satellite Data Cube Pipeline
properties.description: ARCEME Data Cube Pipeline is an end-to-end orchestrator for building spatiotemporal satellite datacubes around disaster event locations. It takes a CSV of coordinates and event dates, queries Sentinel-2 L2A, Sentinel-1 RTC, Copernicus DEM, and ESA WorldCover, applies deep-learning-based cloud masking via SEnSeIv2, and merges all sources into a single rechunked Zarr archive  analysis-ready out of the box. Designed for batch processing of large location sets, with built-in resume support, Docker compatibility, and a single YAML configuration file.

links.title: Project: CLIMATE ADAPTATION, EXTREMES, MULTI-HAZARDS AND GEO-HAZARDS SCIENCE - ARCEME
